ranked_movies.title: Your Name
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently mentioned as a top-tier, emotionally impactful romance anime film. Users praise its stunning visuals and powerful story that blends romance with fantasy elements, often leaving viewers feeling both sad and happy.

ranked_movies.title: A Silent Voice
ranked_movies.reason: Consistently recommended alongside 'Your Name' as a masterpiece of emotional, sad romance anime. It is celebrated for its deep storytelling and beautiful animation.

ranked_movies.title: When Harry Met Sally
ranked_movies.reason: A classic rom-com repeatedly suggested as a prime example of the genre from the 80s/90s era. It is considered a must-watch for its witty dialogue and exploration of friendship turning into love.

ranked_movies.title: Sleepless in Seattle
ranked_movies.reason: Often paired with 'You've Got Mail' as a quintessential Meg Ryan/Tom Hanks feel-good romance from the 90s. It is beloved for its charm and nostalgic value.

ranked_movies.title: You've Got Mail
ranked_movies.reason: Highly recommended as a comforting and charming 90s rom-com. It is frequently mentioned for its chemistry between the leads and its cozy, feel-good atmosphere.

ranked_movies.title: My Happy Marriage
ranked_movies.reason: The subject of its own dedicated discussion post. The live-action film is praised for its unique historical fantasy romance, beautiful aesthetics, and strong lead performances, generating significant positive feedback.

ranked_movies.title: Dirty Dancing
ranked_movies.reason: Listed by the original poster as a favorite and used as a benchmark for the type of wholesome romance with a happy ending they were seeking. It's an iconic 80s film.

ranked_movies.title: While You Were Sleeping
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended multiple times as a feel-good, wholesome romance with a happy ending, starring Sandra Bullock. It fits the OP's request for 90s-era films perfectly.

ranked_movies.title: Mary Shelley
ranked_movies.reason: The subject of its own highly-upvoted post, specifically recommended for its gothic romance and drama. It was praised for its cast, score, and hauntingly beautiful story.

ranked_movies.title: The Proposal
ranked_movies.reason: Suggested as a solid, modern rom-com with great chemistry between Ryan Reynolds and Sandra Bullock. It's a popular choice for those looking for enjoyable, contemporary entries in the genre.

ranked_movies.title: For a Good Time, Call
ranked_movies.reason: The subject of its own post where it was highlighted as an extremely underrated movie focusing on a friendship romance. Multiple comments affirmed it was a surprising and enjoyable watch.

ranked_movies.title: Serendipity
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a fate-driven, charming romance movie. It is often listed alongside other early 2000s classics for those who enjoy magical love stories.

ranked_movies.title: Amélie
ranked_movies.reason: Suggested as a visually unique and heartwarming feel-good movie with a quirky romance at its center. It stands out for its distinct style and charm.

ranked_movies.title: 10 Things I Hate About You
ranked_movies.reason: Listed by an OP as one of their favorite examples of a great rom-com. It's a modern Shakespeare adaptation that remains a cult classic from the late 90s.

ranked_movies.title: Pretty Woman
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a surprisingly wholesome film despite its premise. It is cited as a great example of a classic, feel-good romance with a happy ending.

ranked_movies.title: Wolf Children
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended in anime threads as a beautifully animated and deeply emotional film. While not purely a romance, its core is a mother's love, and it is highly praised for its storytelling.

ranked_movies.title: Josee, the Tiger and the Fish
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned by an OP as one of the emotional romance anime movies they've seen. It is recognized in the anime community as a touching and well-animated film.

ranked_movies.title: My Big Fat Greek Wedding
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended multiple times as a hilarious and heartwarming feel-good movie centered around romance and family. It's a crowd-pleaser from the early 2000s.

ranked_movies.title: The Con-Heartist
ranked_movies.reason: Featured on a user's list of excellent Thai romance movies they discovered. Thai romances were described as 'insanely good', and this was one of the highlighted titles.

ranked_movies.title: Who's Afraid of Virginia Woolf?
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended for someone seeking a melodramatic film with 'fervid romance gushing detestation'. It is the epitome of a intense, love-hate relationship drama.
